title: Marina Towers renovation
description: Complex cantilevered scaffolding built in five stages to keep tenants operational while crews replaced facades.

title: Portside offshore yard
description: Modular bays preassembled offsite and delivered in 72 hours to dockside cranes for a critical lift.

title: High-speed rail bridges
description: Sensor-backed inspections captured every shift, feeding data to a shared dashboard for stakeholders in three countries.
